room.caption: [G6-WindI] It won't be a game like this, I know that much. It'll probably involve birds though.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(58) global.mapTeleport=0
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15MainA)
var tempMplay; if global.bossTrack=0 {tempMplay=findMusic(605)} else if global.bossTrack=1 //Boss Fight: The Unforgotten { tempMplay=findMusic(819) oPlayer1.x=368; oPlayer1.y=208 var viewFix,boss,enemyBarrier; viewFix=instance_create(368,208,oMisc) viewFix.type=0 viewFix.sprite_index=sNull view_object[0]=viewFix boss=instance_create(560,130,oPT_Unforgotten) boss.activateBoss=1 enemyBarrier=instance_create(112,224,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=4 enemyBarrier=instance_create(608,224,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=4 }
playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=5680 newMapY=256 toRoom=rGame6_WindH
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=32 newMapY=288 toRoom=rGame6_WindJ
